calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-110 loop-segregation validation (supersedes 707): driver-only fix to the in-layer-null validity gate -- null-LIVENESS (ARM_NOISE must PERTURB the committed selection), NOT null-LIFT (707's retired requirement that the random null raise entropy above A0, the 700-lineage temperature-null proxy, invalid for a structured-accumulator null). Does loop segregation convert committed-action diversity above the single-arena baseline AND a valid same-layer null?
items.note: diagnostic; PROMOTES NOTHING (ARC-110/ARC-109/MECH-452 stay candidate/substrate_conditional/v3). SUPERSEDES V3-EXQ-707, which self-routed substrate_not_ready_requeue on ONE unmet precondition (in_layer_null_verified_lifting=false: the S2 ARM_NOISE null lifted committed-class entropy strict-above A0 on only 1/4 divergent seeds, threshold 2). Diagnosis: that precondition was MIS-SPECIFIED -- it imported the 700-lineage TEMPERATURE-null liveness proxy ('a valid null must RAISE entropy above A0') onto a STRUCTURED-ACCUMULATOR null; random magnitude-matched content through the loop path (per-loop zscore + Haber spiral, motor never nulled) lands committed-class entropy near BASELINE (structured beats random; random ~ A0), NOT above it. In 707 the null was demonstrably LIVE (perturbed committed selection: disagree 0.37-0.97, flip 0.37-0.66 on every divergent seed) yet sat at/below A0, while A1_LOOPS lifted strict-above A0 on 4/4 divergent seeds -- so the buggy gate spuriously requeued a valid conversion result AND made the pre-registered weakens branch unreachable. 707a replaces null-LIFT with null-LIVENESS (the null must actively perturb committed selection: loop_noise_active_ticks>0 AND flip or disagree > cross-loop-variance floor, on a strict-majority of divergent seeds). C1 (A1 strict-above max(A0, the live null)+margin) UNCHANGED -- it already rules out the zscore-path-artifact hypothesis (a live null on the same zscore path would match A1 and fail C1). Substrate UNCHANGED (the _loop_inlayer_null mechanism is correct); driver-only gate fix. Same 4-arm design (A0_SINGLE_ARENA / A1_LOOPS / ARM_NOISE / ARM_DROP_LIMBIC), same matched constants (GAP-A reef-bipartite + 569i top-k + MECH-448 demotion + finer-channel gating + learned settling), only swept factor = loop segregation. Additive C2 non-degeneracy diagnostic records whether ARM_DROP_LIMBIC differs from A1 (707 showed them byte-identical -> C2 limbic-load-bearing was untestable; C2 is non-load-bearing so this gates no verdict). DOWNSTREAM: a clean SUPPORTS reopens the HELD MECH-441 model-disagreement curiosity falsifier (runs with use_loop_segregation=True). prefer-cloud. Smoke: dry-run PASS 2026-06-28; validate_experiments --strict OK.

items.title: MECH-440 noisy-selection-head propagation falsifier: does NoisyNet weight noise carve committed-action diversity above a matched-pre-commit-variance temperature control (the 687 control), on the 569i top-k + MECH-448 demotion SOTA stack? (loop-seg OFF vs ON disambiguates injection-site vs single-arena/ARC-110)
items.note: diagnostic; PROMOTES NOTHING. Routed by cpkt_tonic_exploration_noise_build_decision_2026-06-27 (MECH-440 substrate built + landed ree-v3 a65609b). 4 arms (A0_OFF / ARM_TEMP=687 matched-pre-commit-variance temperature control / ARM_NOISE_SINGLE / ARM_NOISE_LOOPSEG) on the matched SOTA conversion stack; only swept factor = exploration-injection site. PRIMARY DV committed-action-class entropy; SECONDARY pre-commit sampling-class entropy (thrash-vs-carve). C1 ARM_NOISE_SINGLE committed strict-above ARM_TEMP -> supports MECH-440; if not C1 but ARM_NOISE_LOOPSEG converts -> injection-site fix gated on ARC-110 (route /implement-substrate); if neither -> single-arena collapse subsumes the locus -> weakens + route ARC-110. dacc_max_suppression>0 + both-arms-raise-precommit + supra-floor noise-bias non-vacuity preconditions self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue. Coordinate (no duplicate) with the empirical 687-successor (GAP-C leg) + the 705/706 curiosity lineage. Sibling harness V3-EXQ-707 (ARC-110 validation, prio 400 runs first). Smoke: dry-run PASS 2026-06-27.
